creator: vkushnir@bigmir.net
text:
I'm running X from the console (via startx). The problem is: DRI is getting initialized only if X is started for the first time and only immediately after reboot. In any other case, I'm getting PCI out-of-memory error:

(EE) RADEON(0): [pci] Out of memory (-12)
(EE) RADEON(0): [pci] PCI failed to initialize. Disabling the DRI.
(II) RADEON(0): [drm] removed 1 reserved context for kernel

This box: Athlon64 3000+, MB Asus A8N SLI (s939), 512 MB RAM, Radeon X600 PCIE videocard.

Full dmesg//var/log/Xorg.0.log:
